UpdateSourceArgs: -c "set -e; echo '[RealRTCW] Preloading SteamCMD bootstrap packages with curl'; cd /AMP; mkdir -p /AMP/package /home/amp/Steam/package /home/amp/Steam/logs /tmp/realrtcw-steamcmd; curl -4 -fsSL -o /tmp/realrtcw-steamcmd/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz https://media.steampowered.com/client/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz; tar -xzf /tmp/realrtcw-steamcmd/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz -C /AMP; tar -xzf /tmp/realrtcw-steamcmd/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz -C /home/amp/Steam; curl -4 -fsSL -o /tmp/realrtcw-steamcmd/steam_cmd_linux https://media.steampowered.com/client/steam_cmd_linux; grep -oE '[a-z0-9_]+\.zip\.[a-f0-9]+' /tmp/realrtcw-steamcmd/steam_cmd_linux | sort -u | while read package; do echo \"[RealRTCW] Downloading $package\"; curl -4 -fsSL -o \"/tmp/realrtcw-steamcmd/$package\" \"https://media.steampowered.com/client/$package\"; cp \"/tmp/realrtcw-steamcmd/$package\" \"/AMP/package/$package\"; cp \"/tmp/realrtcw-steamcmd/$package\" \"/home/amp/Steam/package/$package\"; unzip -oq \"/tmp/realrtcw-steamcmd/$package\" -d /AMP; unzip -oq \"/tmp/realrtcw-steamcmd/$package\" -d /home/amp/Steam; done; cp /tmp/realrtcw-steamcmd/steam_cmd_linux /AMP/package/steam_cmd_linux; cp /tmp/realrtcw-steamcmd/steam_cmd_linux /home/amp/Steam/package/steam_cmd_linux; chmod +x /AMP/steamcmd.sh /AMP/linux32/steamcmd /home/amp/Steam/steamcmd.sh /home/amp/Steam/linux32/steamcmd 2>/dev/null || true; echo '[RealRTCW] Seeded SteamCMD files:'; find /AMP /home/amp/Steam -maxdepth 2 \( -path '*/steamcmd.sh' -o -path '*/public/steambootstrapper_english.txt' -o -path '*/package/steam_cmd_linux' -o -path '*/package/*.zip.*' -o -path '*/linux32/steamcmd' \) -printf '%p %s bytes\n' 2>/dev/null | sort; echo '[RealRTCW] SteamCMD bootstrap preload complete'"
